message:
chore(audit,beads): sync tracking files and update program closure signoff artifact

.beads/issues.jsonl: sync bead status from multi-agent session
audit_index.jsonl: add 2 new audit entries
artifacts/raptorq_program_closure_signoff_packet_v1.json: update closure
signoff posterior thresholds and evidence metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
